mixStrategy: Driving 12-bar blues energizer: Steel Guitar leads with bluesy bends and phrases in mid-range, Electric Bass walks quarter-note lines through chord tones and chromatic approaches, Piano comps with rhythmic 7th-chord stabs on upbeats, Drums provide shuffle feel with triplet hi-hats. Mix: Drums foundation, Bass anchoring low-end, Piano mid-spread, Steel Guitar on top. All follow A7(I7)-D7(IV7)-E7(V7) 12-bar form.

tracks.name: Steel Guitar Melody
tracks.frequencyRole: high-mid (C4-C5, ~261-523Hz) - bluesy lead phrases sitting above piano comping

tracks.name: Electric Bass Walking
tracks.frequencyRole: low (E1-E3, ~41-165Hz) - walking bass line providing harmonic foundation and forward motion

tracks.name: Piano Comping
tracks.frequencyRole: mid (C3-C5, ~131-523Hz) - rhythmic 7th chord voicings providing harmonic color on upbeats

tracks.name: Drums Shuffle
tracks.frequencyRole: full spectrum - kick (low ~60Hz), snare (mid ~200Hz), hi-hat (high ~8kHz) providing shuffle groove foundation
